item.title: [No Priors] Baseten CEO Tuhin Srivastava on the AI Inference Crunch, Custom Models, and Building the Inference Cloud
item.description:
Speaker 1 | 00:05 - 00:28 Hi, listeners. Today, Elad and I are here with Tuhin Srivastava, the founder and CEO of Base10, inference cloud. We're here to talk about capacity constraints for AI compute, why inference is the last market, how the workload is changing, the open source and perhaps multi chip future, and what 30x scale in a year looks like. Tuhin, welcome back.
Speaker 2 | 00:28 - 00:30 Hi. Good to see you.
Speaker 3 | 00:30 - 00:31 Thanks for having me.
Speaker 1 | 00:31 - 00:41 Al...
